page.title: Top Boat Activities for a Marbella Stag Weekend Rental

data.meta_description: Discover top marbella stag weekend boat activities with our fleet in Puerto Banús. Jet skis, swimming, and party packages from €749/2h. Book now!
data.summary: Explore the best boat activities for a marbella stag weekend rental, from jet ski thrills to sunset partying. Our fleet departs Puerto Banús with licensed skippers and inclusive drinks.
key_facts: All charters include licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% IVA.
Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) from €749/2h to €2,299/8h.
Tier B Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) includes a free jet ski from €4,719/4h.
Departures from Puerto Banús, Marbella's luxury marina.
Swim stops at Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, or Cabopino beaches.
10+ boats available for groups of 5 to 12 passengers.
Custom itineraries for stag parties: lunch, water toys, and sunset views.

faq.q: What boat activities are included in a marbella stag weekend rental?
faq.a: Our charters offer swimming at secluded coves, jet skiing (free on Mangusta 80), sunbathing, and partying with included drinks. You can also anchor near Puerto Banús for beach club vibes or cruise to Estepona for a longer adventure.

faq.q: How much does a boat rental for a stag weekend in Marbella cost?
faq.a: Prices start at €749 for 2 hours on an Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) or Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 pax), including skipper, drinks, and snacks. For larger groups, the Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) costs €4,719 minimum 4 hours with a free jet ski. Other boat prices are on request via WhatsApp.

faq.q: Which boat is best for a stag party of 12 people?
faq.a: The Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) is ideal—spacious deck, free jet ski, and departs Puerto Banús. Alternatively, the Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m, 12 pax) or Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) offer luxury lounging. All include drinks and a skipper.

faq.q: Can we bring our own food and decorations for a stag party?
faq.a: Yes, you can bring your own food and decorations. Our charters provide a cooler, ice, and a basic snack pack. We recommend ordering a catered platter from local delis in Marbella—just let us know in advance.

faq.q: What is the cancellation policy for stag weekend boat rentals?
faq.a: Cancellations made 7 days before departure receive a full refund. Within 7 days, a 50% charge applies. No-shows or weather cancellations are handled case-by-case. Contact us via WhatsApp for details.

faq.q: Do we need a license to drive the boat during a stag weekend?
faq.a: No, all our rentals include a licensed skipper who handles navigation. You can relax and enjoy the activities. The skipper can also suggest the best swim stops and party spots along the Costa del Sol.

faq.q: What time of day is best for a stag boat party in Marbella?
faq.a: Afternoon charters (2 pm to sunset) are popular for stag parties, combining swimming with sunset views over La Concha. Morning slots (10 am–2 pm) are calmer for water sports. Evening charters (7 pm–11 pm) focus on partying with city lights.

faq.q: How do I book a boat for a stag weekend in Marbella?
faq.a: Contact us via WhatsApp or email through our website. Provide your preferred date, group size, and desired activities. We'll confirm availability and send a payment link. Deposit (50%) secures the booking.

data.body_html:
Planning a marbella stag weekend boat activities package is the ultimate way to celebrate the groom-to-be. With our fleet departing from Puerto Banús, you get luxury yachts, included drinks, and a licensed skipper—no hidden costs. Whether you want jet ski thrills, swimming in crystal coves, or sunset partying, we have the perfect boat for your group. Prices start at €749/2h on an Astondoa 40, and each charter includes fuel, insurance, and 21% IVA.

Why Choose a Boat for Your Marbella Stag Weekend

A boat rental transforms a stag weekend into an exclusive floating party. You avoid crowded bars and control the itinerary—swim at Cala del Faro, anchor near Cabopino, or cruise along the Golden Mile. With 10+ boats for 5 to 12 passengers, you can tailor the day to your group's vibe. All charters include a skipper, so no one needs a license. Plus, the included drinks (beer, wine, cava, soft drinks) and snacks keep the energy up without extra costs.

Top Boat Activities for a Stag Party in Marbella

  • Jet Skiing: Free on the Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) for 4-hour charters from €4,719. Ride the waves off Puerto Banús.
  • Swimming & Snorkelling: Stop at Cala Cortés or Cala del Faro—clear waters and rocky coves perfect for a dip.
  • Sunset Cruising: Head west towards Estepona for golden hour views over La Concha mountain.
  • Beach Club Hopping: Anchor near Nikki Beach or Ocean Club for a quick tender ride to the party.
  • Onboard BBQ: Bring your own grill (gas only) and cook fresh seafood—our skipper can recommend spots.
  • Music & Dancing: Most boats have Bluetooth speakers. Set the playlist and dance on the foredeck.

Our Best Boats for Stag Weekends

Based on group size and activity preferences, here are our top picks for a boat rental Marbella stag weekend:

BoatLengthMax PaxBest ForPrice (from)
Astondoa 4012.5m9Budget-friendly party€749/2h
Azimut 3912.5m11Small groups with style€749/2h
Mangusta 8024m12Jet ski & luxury€4,719/4h
Azimut 58 Flybridge17.6m12Sunset loungingOn request
Ferretti 9429m12Ultimate luxuryOn request

For larger groups, the Maiora 26m or Canados 86 also accommodate 12 guests. Contact us via WhatsApp for custom quotes.

Sample Itinerary: 4-Hour Stag Boat Party

  1. 14:00 – Board at Puerto Banús. Meet skipper, safety briefing, and drinks served.
  2. 14:30 – Cruise south towards Cabopino. Music on, beers open.
  3. 15:00 – Anchor at Cala del Faro. Swim, snorkel, and jet ski (if on Mangusta 80).
  4. 16:00 – Light snacks and more drinks. Sunbathe on the foredeck.
  5. 17:00 – Head back to Puerto Banús, passing the Golden Mile skyline.
  6. 18:00 – Disembark. Optional: head to a nearby beach club for dinner.

This itinerary works for any boat in our fleet. Adjust timings for sunset or evening charters.

What’s Included in Every Stag Boat Rental

  • Licensed skipper (English & Spanish speaking)
  • Fuel for the full charter
  • Water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, and cava
  • Light snacks (crisps, nuts, olives)
  • Insurance and safety equipment
  • Spanish IVA (21%) – no surprise taxes

You only need to bring swimwear, sunscreen, and your playlist. For a truly marbella stag weekend boat activities experience, add a jet ski upgrade or a catered paella platter (available on request).

Booking Tips for a Smooth Stag Weekend

  • Book early: Summer weekends fill fast. Reserve at least 2 weeks ahead.
  • Check group size: Our boats max at 12 passengers. For larger parties, consider two boats.
  • Weather: Marbella averages 300 sunny days a year, but we monitor forecasts. Rescheduling is free 48h before.
  • Deposit: 50% via bank transfer or card. Balance due on the day.
  • WhatsApp: Use our chat for quick questions—we respond within 1 hour.

Frequently Asked Questions

What boat activities are included in a marbella stag weekend rental?

Our charters offer swimming at secluded coves, jet skiing (free on Mangusta 80), sunbathing, and partying with included drinks. You can also anchor near Puerto Banús for beach club vibes or cruise to Estepona for a longer adventure.

How much does a boat rental for a stag weekend in Marbella cost?

Prices start at €749 for 2 hours on an Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) or Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 pax), including skipper, drinks, and snacks. For larger groups, the Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) costs €4,719 minimum 4 hours with a free jet ski. Other boat prices are on request via WhatsApp.

Which boat is best for a stag party of 12 people?

The Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) is ideal—spacious deck, free jet ski, and departs Puerto Banús. Alternatively, the Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m, 12 pax) or Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) offer luxury lounging. All include drinks and a skipper.

Can we bring our own food and decorations for a stag party?

Yes, you can bring your own food and decorations. Our charters provide a cooler, ice, and a basic snack pack. We recommend ordering a catered platter from local delis in Marbella—just let us know in advance.

What is the cancellation policy for stag weekend boat rentals?

Cancellations made 7 days before departure receive a full refund. Within 7 days, a 50% charge applies. No-shows or weather cancellations are handled case-by-case. Contact us via WhatsApp for details.

Do we need a license to drive the boat during a stag weekend?

No, all our rentals include a licensed skipper who handles navigation. You can relax and enjoy the activities. The skipper can also suggest the best swim stops and party spots along the Costa del Sol.

What time of day is best for a stag boat party in Marbella?

Afternoon charters (2 pm to sunset) are popular for stag parties, combining swimming with sunset views over La Concha. Morning slots (10 am–2 pm) are calmer for water sports. Evening charters (7 pm–11 pm) focus on partying with city lights.

How do I book a boat for a stag weekend in Marbella?

Contact us via WhatsApp or email through our website. Provide your preferred date, group size, and desired activities. We'll confirm availability and send a payment link. Deposit (50%) secures the booking.

Ready to plan the ultimate marbella stag weekend boat activities? Browse our fleet and book your charter today. For instant help, message us on WhatsApp—we'll customise your itinerary in minutes.
